diypensacola

the punksacola show archive · every flyer we could dig up

instagramjoin our discordfacebookshowgoer guidesubmit a showlocal music streamsour linksdonate

search the scene?

one place for the whole record: 1177 past shows, 2296 bands & acts, and 82 venues across 15 years, back to our oldest flyer. it's one search engine: pick what you're searching below, type to narrow it, or work the refine panel like a library search: stack filters for who played, the room, the cover, the ages, even the night of the week, and watch the counts move — on shows, bands, or venues alike. filters ride in the page link, so a stacked search can be copied and shared. press / to jump to the search box, or hit random show and fall down a rabbit hole.

a tag like all-ages, cover, or scene only shows up when a flyer said so outright. no tag isn't a no, it's just a show whose flyer didn't state it. filter by these to narrow, not to rule shows out.

the scene by the numbers → — shows by year, busiest venues and acts, and more, broken out on its own page.

nothing on the record matches that stack of filters. loosen one, or and start over.
